headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $55
summary: Citigroup  analyst John Godyn   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $44 to $55.

headline: Last chance: Earn up to 90,000 bonus points with these Southwest credit card offers
summary: These Southwest cards provide several benefits that make earning a Companion Pass much easier.
